name: VibeKnow Video Generator
description: AI-powered knowledge video generation - upload documents or URLs, generate professional videos via IM chat

figlensBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the go-figlens video generation service

apiKey.description: API key for authenticating with go-figlens

webhookSecret.description: HMAC secret for verifying webhook callbacks from go-figlens

callbackBaseUrl.description: Public base URL for webhook callbacks (e.g. https://your-domain.com). Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:3000
